expectations: Asks questions one at a time, waiting for feedback before continuing
Provides a recommended answer for each question
Walks down the decision tree, resolving dependencies between decisions
Explores the codebase to answer questions that can be answered from code
Challenges terminology against the existing CONTEXT.md glossary
Updates CONTEXT.md inline when a term is resolved — does not batch
Offers ADRs only when hard to reverse, surprising without context, and result of real trade-off
Does not treat CONTEXT.md as a spec or implementation record
